subject: [RFC PATCH 08/45] mm: page_alloc: track actual page contents in pageblock flags

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch extends the pageblock_data flags to track the actual types of pages allocated within a pageblock, independent of its intended migratetype. The new flags PB_has_unmovable, PB_has_reclaimable, and PB_has_movable are set at allocation time and cleared when the pageblock is full or migration confirms no pages of that type remain. This allows for superpageblock-level steering decisions to direct future allocations to already-tainted regions, keeping clean regions available for large contiguous allocations.
